title: Deep learning for text classification
abstract: We study neural approaches for classifying long scientific documents and evaluating quality.

title: Topic models for tags
abstract: Latent topic structures improve retrieval and can be used to suggest user tags.

title: A survey on recommendation systems
abstract: This article reviews recommendation methods and discusses ranking and evaluation.

title: Learning representations of documents
abstract: Distributed vectors capture semantic meaning from text corpora.

title: Attention mechanisms in NLP
abstract: Attention allows models to focus on important words in sequence modeling tasks.

title: Support vector machines in practice
abstract: Linear classifiers remain strong baselines for sparse text features.

title: Naive Bayes for document tagging
abstract: Probabilistic methods are fast and robust for multi label text prediction.

title: Semantic indexing for papers
abstract: Indexing scientific papers with tags helps organization and retrieval.

title: Neural sequence models for abstracts
abstract: Recurrent neural networks model dependencies in scientific abstracts.

title: Improving search in digital libraries
abstract: Better metadata and tags improve discovery in scholarly search engines.

title: Graph based recommendation
abstract: User item graphs can improve recommendation diversity and relevance.

title: Evaluation metrics for imbalanced data
abstract: Micro precision recall and f1 are useful for skewed multi label tasks.
